what_it_does: It records a draft noticeboard item that announces a synthesis of five prior Obsidian-as-host explorations, framing a read-only mirror as the strong convergence and listing the topics to be covered, while explicitly stating it is not a decision.
observations: It is a draft document in the dragnet-development channel.
The title frames the item as a synthesis plus a 'decisive check'.
The body is a single short paragraph that names the intended sections (convergence, gains, lossy/gated parts, decisive check, reuse, shape of answer).
It references an order of six related board items via the order frontmatter.
standouts: The strong convergence is described as a 'read-only mirror'.
It is a meta/synthesis placeholder rather than a substantive analysis.
concerns: The body is only a framing paragraph; the promised synthesis is not actually present in the file.
As a draft it may be incomplete or awaiting elaboration.
notes: A draft synthesis placeholder for the Obsidian-as-host thread that flags a read-only mirror as the likely convergence but deliberately avoids making a decision.
questions: What are the five Obsidian explorations referenced?
What is the 'decisive check' and what criteria will it use?
Which six ordered items are inputs and how do they relate to each section?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to synthesize five explorations, but the actual content is only a brief outline/abstract of the intended synthesis; the detailed content is missing.
intention_signals: It appears to be setting up a structured synthesis post that evaluates whether Obsidian should be used as a host, identifies a preferred pattern (read-only mirror), and separates observation from decision.
novelty: It treats a tooling/hosting choice as a convergence problem with an explicit 'decisive check' and a deliberate 'not a decision' stance, which is unusual for a design note.
contribution: It contributes a concise framing scaffold for an Obsidian-as-host synthesis, including the read-only mirror concept, a list of evaluation dimensions, and an explicit non-decisional marker.
summary_for_embedding: A draft noticeboard item outlining a synthesis of five Obsidian-as-host explorations, centering on a read-only mirror convergence and listing evaluation dimensions without making a decision.
intention_for_embedding: To prepare and frame a structured synthesis that evaluates Obsidian hosting options and identifies a decisive check while remaining non-decisional.
